subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Ponder thou upon the Divine Will and Purpose and the heavenly Providence. Consider how numerous are the men in this day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی در اراده و مشیت الهی و عنایت ربانی تفکر نما چه مقدار از رجال الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
